description: Style Note Let only transform your everyday attire to fun, colourful and stylish! We're super excited in the myntra office to be selling these flattering tops and dresses from the quirky, flirty, denim brand ONLY. It's easy to look both cute and trendy when you're wearing anything from this summery collection. Product Details Multi-coloured printed top, has a mandarin collar with a split V neckline, half buttoned placket, pin tucks at the front and back yoke which flare from the waist, short sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a tie detail at the back Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach or tumble dry Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size 38
